name: grimoire
description: Native desktop app for knowledge management and AI agent interaction
author: Em <ember.shreve@gmail.com>

scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && npm run build:main && concurrently -n main,renderer,electron "npm run dev:main" "npm run dev:renderer" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:renderer && npm run build:main
